'''zhawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knavishly|knavishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knavishly|knavishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhawate|zhawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhawatesher|zhawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawatesherĂ«m|zhawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhawatero|zhawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhawateshĂ«|zhawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawateshĂ«m|zhawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhawatero|gokizhawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhawateshĂ«|gokizhawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawateshĂ«m|gokizhawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhawankerom|gozhawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhawankeshĂ«|gozhawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawankeshĂ«m|gozhawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhawankeya|gozhawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhawaterom|zhawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawatemu|zhawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhawateya|zhawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhawaterom|gokizhawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawatemu|gokizhawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhawateya|gokizhawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhawawate|zhawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhawawatesher|zhawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawawatesherĂ«m|zhawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhawawatero|zhawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhawawateshĂ«|zhawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawawateshĂ«m|zhawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhawawatero|gokizhawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhawawateshĂ«|gokizhawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawawateshĂ«m|gokizhawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhawawankerom|gozhawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhawawankeshĂ«|gozhawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawawankeshĂ«m|gozhawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhawawankeya|gozhawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhawawaterom|zhawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawawatemu|zhawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhawawateya|zhawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhawawaterom|gokizhawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawawatemu|gokizhawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhawawateya|gokizhawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠte|zhĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠtesher|zhĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠtero|zhĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠwĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠterom|zhĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠtemu|zhĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠteya|zhĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠwĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠwĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafwafte|zhafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafwaftesher|zhafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafwaftesherĂ«m|zhafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafwaftero|zhafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafwafteshĂ«|zhafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafwafteshĂ«m|zhafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafwaftero|gokizhafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafwafteshĂ«|gokizhafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafwafteshĂ«m|gokizhafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafwafnkerom|gozhafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafwafnkeshĂ«|gozhafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafwafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafwafnkeya|gozhafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafwafterom|zhafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafwaftemu|zhafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafwafteya|zhafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafwafterom|gokizhafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafwaftemu|gokizhafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafwafteya|gokizhafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
